title: VERINOX AEGISLOOP v2.0: Sovereign Evidence-Closed Recovery Fabric
description: A proposed candidate invention blueprint for causally bound recovery of cyber-physical and reconfigurable systems, combining claim-scoped evidence independence, dual counterfactual outcomes, one-use bonded actuation, multi-horizon measured closure, and revocable learning lineage. This is a technical disclosure, not a patent, implemented product, certification, or independent validation.
notes: Independent Research Publication No. 5. v2.0 Publication Candidate. Not peer reviewed. Proposed candidate invention blueprint; no implementation or validation supplied.
